name: O.R.C. Firefly
description: The O.R.C. Firefly is the militarized version of the night firefly. It keeps its luminous shot and aerial presence, but now uses spacing with much more constant aggression.
behavior: It patrols above gardens and O.R.C. zones looking for comfortable firing angles. It may seem light, but it rarely stays still long enough to give you a free punish.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and becomes especially annoying when you are already busy with grounded enemies. One bad step can leave you eating shots while trying to reposition.
interactionWithCreatures: Inside O.R.C. groups it works as an aerial harasser, forcing you to look up while grounded units close in.
strategy: Busting damage is still the best answer. Close in after the shot and do not leave it hovering freely, because its value rises sharply when nothing forces it to move.

abilities.name: Luminous Shot
abilities.description: It fires a bright aerial blast to maintain pressure while hovering just outside easy reach.
